2606.23568.title: SVD-Surgeon: Optimal Singular-Value Surgery for Large Language Model Compression
2606.23568.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks, but their deployment is constrained by substantial memory and compute requirements. Low-rank compression via singular value decomposition (SVD) is an effective remedy, but existing methods focus on how to factorize and which components to keep. We introduce SVD-Surgeon, a training-free method that brings the Optimal Brain Surgeon (OBS) framework to the singular-value basis. Treating each singular value as a parameter, it computes a closed-form update of the retained singular values that compensates, to second order in the model loss, for those removed by truncation. The same analysis yields a saliency for choosing which values to prune. As it operates directly on the singular-value factorization, SVD-Surgeon can be layered on top of existing SVD compressors. Applied to SVD-LLM, a leading SVD-based method, it improves the perplexity-compression trade-off on the OPT family and LLaMA 2-7B without any retraining.
2606.23568.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在各種任務中表現出色，但其部署受到大量記憶體和計算需求的限制。通過奇異值分解（SVD）的低秩壓縮是一種有效的解決方案，但現有方法專注於如何因式分解以及保留哪些組件。我們介紹了SVD-Surgeon，這是一種無需訓練的方法，將最佳大腦外科醫生（OBS）框架應用於奇異值基礎。將每個奇異值視為一個參數，它計算出保留的奇異值的封閉形式更新，該更新在模型損失的二階補償中，補償了由截斷移除的值。同樣的分析產生了一個選擇修剪哪些值的顯著性。由於它直接作用於奇異值因式分解，SVD-Surgeon可以疊加在現有的SVD壓縮器之上。應用於SVD-LLM，這是一種領先的基於SVD的方法，它在OPT系列和LLaMA 2-7B上改善了困惑度與壓縮的權衡，且無需重新訓練。
2606.23568.author: Mahmoud Safari et.al.
